pilot_focus: Validate PCA-basis SAE construction and confirm decomposition pattern on 2 SAEs + 3 hierarchies

pilots.name: Pilot: PCA-Basis SAE Construction
pilots.description: Compute top-k PCs from 512 tokens (vs 2048 in full) and construct PCA SAE. Verify orthonormality and L0 matching.
pilots.pass_criteria: PCA SAE loads; decoder orthonormal (max |I - W^T W| < 0.01); L0 within 30% of Standard

pilots.name: Pilot: Decomposition on 2 SAEs x 3 Hierarchies
pilots.description: Run absorption on Standard and Matryoshka SAEs (trained), Random SAE, and PCA SAE. Use 3 hierarchies (building, tool, animal) and 2 non-hierarchy pairs. Confirm PCA ~= trained pattern.
pilots.pass_criteria: All 4 conditions return finite scores; PCA semantic absorption within 0.15 of trained; random ~= trained (replicating iter_002 identity)

pilots.name: Pilot: Downstream Metrics on 2 SAEs
pilots.description: Collect sparse probing F1 and L0 for Standard and Matryoshka SAEs. Verify metric ranges and data quality.
pilots.pass_criteria: F1 in [0, 1]; L0 consistent with config; data successfully saved to JSON

pilots.name: Pilot: Low Co-occurrence Pairs on 2 SAEs
pilots.description: Test 3 low co-occurrence pairs on Standard and Matryoshka. Verify probe AUROC < 0.8 (confirming these are genuinely hard).
pilots.pass_criteria: All pairs finite; at least 2/3 have probe AUROC < 0.8

pilot_go_criteria.description: Proceed to full experiments if all pilots pass
conditions: PCA SAE constructs successfully and produces absorption scores
Random ~= trained identity replicates (confirming metric is not learned-structure-specific)
Downstream metrics are collectable and in valid ranges
Low co-occurrence pairs show lower probe AUROC than hierarchies
